claim: A core module (ontology / graph / proposal / invariant layer) shall never import a periphery module (attention, reflection, generator-internal) -- the core/periphery dependency arrow points one way only.
why: Intra-package sibling of R-core-imports-stdlib-or-hotam-spec-only (which guards the INTER-package arrow). Not yet implemented: the automated AST import-ratchet enforcer does not exist (historically spec/tests/test_core_periphery_import_direction.py, a static import scan mirroring test_backend_neutral_scope.py, that proved the core was clean plus a negative control proving the scanner was not vacuous). The property holds structurally in the current dependency graph (internal/ontology, internal/invariants, internal/proposal as core; internal/diagnose, internal/generator as periphery) but no automated enforcer exists yet.
